name: Linkup MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Linkup MCP server providing real-time web search and content retrieval optimized for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) workflows — giving agents access to current web information.
use_cases: Real-time web search in agent workflows for current events
Grounding LLM responses with up-to-date web content
Research automation using structured search results
Fact-checking and verification with web sources
Competitive intelligence gathering from real-time search
not_for: High-volume search at very low cost (Linkup is a paid service)
best_when: An agent needs real-time web search results with full content extraction — better than snippet-only search for RAG applications.
avoid_when: You only need search snippets (not full content) — cheaper alternatives may suffice.

auth.notes: Single API key via LINKUP_API_KEY environment variable. No scope granularity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free credits on signup; limited monthly quota
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-per-search; premium plans for higher volume
pricing.notes: Usage-based pricing scales with search volume. Good for development and moderate agent workloads.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply by plan; not prominently documented

known_agent_gotchas: Search result quality varies significantly by query — test with your specific use case
Rate limits not prominently documented — implement backoff and monitoring
Full content retrieval adds latency vs snippet-only search — budget accordingly
No scope granularity on API keys — single key grants full access
Newer service than Exa/Brave — less proven reliability track record
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. GDPR compliant (EU-based). Single API key without scopes. No special security concerns for web search data.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. GDPR compliant. No scope granularity on API keys.
